clips.title: The Wyrm
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A high windswept cliff above a misty valley, a vast dragon circling a distant peak, storm clouds. Dusk, epic. A person in ornate plate armor stands at the cliff edge facing the dragon, cloak streaming. A drawn sword, a tattered banner, swirling embers. Dramatic stormlight with fiery glow, rich painterly grade. 28mm feel, crane rise. Epic fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Bladelight
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. An enchanted forest at night, glowing mushrooms, drifting spirit-lights, ancient twisted trees. Night, mystical. A person in a traveling cloak holds a glowing enchanted sword aloft, light spilling across the face. Runes, fireflies, mossy roots. Cool magical glow from the blade, rich painterly grade. 40mm feel, slow dolly in. Mystical fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Gate
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A colossal ancient castle gate at the end of a torchlit causeway, banners, towering spires. Dusk, grand. A person in a hooded cloak walks toward the great gate, small against its scale. Braziers, stone guardians, drifting mist. Warm torchlight against cool dusk, rich painterly grade. 28mm feel, slow dolly in. Grand fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Arcane
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A circular stone wizard's tower chamber, floating tomes, glowing sigils, a starry oculus above. Night, arcane. A person in embroidered robes casts a spell, glowing arcane energy swirling from their hands. A staff, candles, floating runes. Vivid magical glow, rich painterly grade. 40mm feel, slow orbit. Arcane fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Throne
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A vast throne hall, towering columns, stained-glass windows casting colored light, a grand dais. Day, regal. A person in royal regalia stands before the great throne, chin high, cape flowing. A crown, banners, shafts of colored light. Rich colored window light, painterly grade. 35mm feel, slow dolly in. Regal fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: High Pass
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A snowy mountain pass under a dramatic sky, jagged peaks, a distant fortress. Day, cold. A person in a fur-lined cloak leads forward through the snow holding a banner, wind whipping. Snowdrifts, a walking staff, soaring hawks. Cold dramatic daylight, rich painterly grade. 28mm feel, side tracking. Adventurous fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Glade
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A luminous elven glade, silver trees, glowing pools, floating petals. Day, serene. A person in flowing elegant garb stands in the glade, hand raised as light motes gather. Glowing flowers, a stone arch, drifting light. Soft luminous glow, rich painterly grade. 40mm feel, slow dolly in. Ethereal fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: First Light
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A misty battlefield at dawn, scattered banners, a distant army, rolling fog. Dawn, tense. A person in battle-worn armor stands surveying the field, sword planted, resolute. Broken shields, ravens, drifting mist. Cool dawn light through mist, rich painterly grade. 28mm feel, crane rise. Somber fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Archive
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. An immense ancient library, towering bookshelves vanishing into gloom, floating candles, spiral stairs. Night, hushed. A person in scholar's robes walks the aisle holding a glowing tome, gazing up. Scrolls, dust motes, a ladder. Warm candlelight in deep shadow, rich painterly grade. 35mm feel, side tracking. Mysterious fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Portal
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. Ancient stone ruins at night, a great glowing magic portal swirling between standing stones, ivy and moss. Night, charged. A person in a cloak stands before the portal, reaching toward its glow, hair lifted by its energy. Runestones, floating debris, sparks. Vivid portal glow, rich painterly grade. 40mm feel, slow dolly in. Charged fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hearth
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. A warm timbered fantasy tavern, a roaring hearth, hanging lanterns, wooden beams. Night, cozy. A person in traveler's garb sits by the fire with a tankard, relaxed, firelight on the face. A lute, a stew pot, a sleeping hound. Warm firelight glow, rich painterly grade. 50mm feel, slow dolly in. Cozy fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Setting Sail
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy art, painterly, dramatic, richly detailed, magical. Fantasy realm. The prow of a grand sailing ship cutting through a sunlit sea, billowing sails, distant floating islands. Day, adventurous. A person in a captain's coat stands at the prow gazing ahead, wind in the sails. Rigging, a spyglass, wheeling gulls. Bright sea light, rich painterly grade. 28mm feel, crane rise. Adventurous fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.
